articles.title: Weather for Indus today
articles.body:
A high pressure system of caste hatred dominated the board, bringing with it a torrent of violent rhetoric against low castes. The opener, which listed various brutal actions, sparked a varied response from the community.

A scattered drizzle of livestream-death gossip fell in the morning, as Anon discussed the recent deaths of erotic models during online broadcasts.

The topic drew some attention, with one poster sharing a story about a 24-year-old model from Italy who died during the COVID-19 pandemic.

A cold snap of incel anxiety settled over part of the board, as one anon sought advice on transforming into a 'Chad' within two months.

Elsewhere, a front of religious insults blew in, with Buddhists being called 'dumb' and atheist.

A related low-pressure system of Hindu nationalism appeared, with some posters expressing anti-Pakistani sentiments and suggesting that Indian patriotism would suffer if Pakistan ceased to exist.

articles.title: Anon Calls for Violence Against Low Castes, Sparking Varied Replies
articles.body:
Anon opened the thread with a post calling for violent actions against low castes, including killing, beheading, and other forms of brutal harm. The original post listed several graphic and disturbing scenarios.

Another anon responded by blaming low castes for India's poverty and the country's negative reputation abroad. This respondent claimed that low castes are responsible for ruining prestigious Indian institutions.

A different anon suggested that allowing low castes to use upper caste surnames could lead to low castes committing crimes and then blaming upper castes for their actions. This respondent mentioned specific cases where such scenarios allegedly played out.

One anon brought up a case of a dalit man accused of raping a 5-year-old, noting that the dalit man's community and supporters abandoned him once he was caught. This respondent seemed to imply that such behavior was predictable.

Another respondent offered a more measured critique, focusing on the impact of reservation policies on social dynamics. This anon described individuals who use reservations as being dysgenic.

Anon also engaged in a discussion about the role of lineage in Hinduism and the implications for social hierarchy. Some respondents seemed to grapple with the idea of balancing traditional social structures with modern realities.

The thread also included a discussion on genetics and social behavior, with one anon suggesting that the behavior of low castes could be explained by epigenetics and the consequences of inbreeding over generations.

articles.title: Erotic model deaths during livestreams discussed
articles.body:
Anon described a 24-year-old Onlyfans and PornHub erotic gay model who died during a livestream in Italy. The model was talking about the latest news while a radio station played in the background during the COVID-19 pandemic.

Another anon mentioned a case from a 2004 German Forensic Medicine textbook. A 24-year-old man intentionally caused the death of his 28-year-old gay partner.

Anon also shared a case of a 23-year-old woman who died while engaging in erotic asphyxiation with her partner. The partner had waited too long, leaving her hanging for a minute while he masturbated.

A different scenario involved an 18-year-old man streaming on an erotic platform. A viewer requested that he masturbate while hanging himself in exchange for a donation.

The viewer suggested using a bed sheet when the man said he didn't have a rope. Anon questioned whether a death during a livestream was a genuine suicide or an accident.

Some believed the person wanted to make their death stand out by masturbating while dying. Others thought it was an accidental death.

Anon noted that some people get aroused by unusual things, such as imagining being killed by hanging or strangulation. The brain deprived of blood can create a hallucinogenic effect.

One respondent shared their personal experience of watching gore videos since they were 13. They found hanging videos particularly uncomfortable, even after years of exposure to gore.

articles.title: Incel to Chad Transformation Advice
articles.body:
Anon asked how to achieve an 'Incel to Chad transformation in 2 months.' One anon responded with a blunt 'GET FUCKED, INCEL,' and then offered a series of directives: go to the gym, eat protein, sleep, grow a beard, get a haircut, stop fapping, stop bitching, stop whining, and stop being a 'FUCKING LOSER.' Another anon suggested that the original poster already has a sexual partner but wants to have kids and make more money.

This anon also mentioned that they and their partner lost their virginity to each other when the poster was 25 and their partner was 26.

One respondent advised the original poster to stop using labels like 'randis' and instead think of promiscuous women simply as that, which they claimed would enhance the poster's chances of 'banging one.' A different anon suggested getting a vasectomy, stating that having children is not worth it in the current economy.

Other posts included discussions about underwear, with one explaining the difference between thongs and G-strings, and another asking for advice on how to interact with women without using abusive language.

articles.title: Anon Calls Buddhists 'Dumb', Atheist
articles.body:
Anon questioned the intelligence of Buddhists, calling them 'dumb' and 'atheist'. They claimed Buddhism made 90% of North Indians 'vegan and subhuman'.

Another anon replied that Buddhism emerged from one person and 'cucked' the subcontinent, before being adopted by non-Indians.

A respondent stated that actual Buddhist scholars do not recognise Ambedkarite Buddhism as a legitimate form of the faith. They described it as a 'political ideology with Buddhist flavour'.

Anon also discussed the relationship between Buddhism and Hinduism, with one poster describing Buddhism as 'parasitism' that relies on other faiths to survive.

articles.title: Indians on Pakistan's Existence
articles.body:
Anon claimed that if Pakistan were to vanish, Indian patriotism would plummet. Another anon responded that Indians do not obsess over Pakistan, saying they have better things to do.

A respondent stated that coexistence with Islam is not possible and expressed hatred towards it. Anon also mentioned that low castes should be kept away from the army and bureaucracy, calling for anti-reservation policies.

One anon sarcastically noted that Pakistan's existence seems to be the only thing keeping Indian nationalism intact.
